stemHtml: An aircraft equipped with EGPWS is making a visual approach to a runway with a functioning ILS and non-standard gear and flap configuration. To avoid inappropriate alerts, the crew is able to…

options.a: Inhibit the BITE function of the EGPWS.
options.b: Manually select the approach mode on the EGPWS.
options.c: Inhibit flap mode and you can also inhibit the glide slope mode on EGPWS.
